summary: Safari Route Explorer page redesign tested successfully. All 9 requested features working correctly with interactive Leaflet map, route switching, journey simulation animation, and wildlife zones toggle.

three_safari_route_cards.details: All three route cards display correctly - Jeep Safari (green, ₹2500, 3-4hrs, 25km), Bus Safari (brown, ₹800, 2-3hrs, 18km), Elephant Camp (orange, ₹500, 1.5-2hrs, 5km)

route_card_click_updates_map.details: Clicking each route card updates the map with correct colored polyline and adjusts bounds to fit the route

route_details_sidebar_update.details: Route Details sidebar updates correctly showing Duration, Distance, Difficulty, Max Capacity, Best Time for each route

leaflet_map_with_openstreetmap.details: Interactive Leaflet map loads successfully with OpenStreetMap tiles

colored_polylines_on_map.details: Safari routes display as colored polylines - Jeep (green), Bus (brown), Elephant Camp (orange)

wildlife_zones_dashed_circles.details: Wildlife zones show as dashed circles with legend - Tiger (red), Elephant (green), Bird (blue), Deer (amber)

waypoint_markers_numbered.details: Waypoint markers display on route with numbered circles (1,2,3) and start/end flag icons

simulate_journey_animation.details: Simulate Journey button starts animation with progress bar, animated marker follows route path, button shows 'Simulating Journey...' during animation

wildlife_zones_toggle.details: Wildlife Zones toggle button works correctly - hides/shows all 4 wildlife zone circles on the map

journey_timeline_section.details: Journey Timeline displays all waypoints with time badges, descriptions, elevation info, and is clickable

highlights_section.details: Highlights section shows unique highlights for each route (e.g., Tiger sightings, Elephant bathing)

book_this_safari_button.details: Book This Safari CTA button displays with correct pricing and is styled with route's gradient color

seed_data_creation: N/A - Safari routes are hardcoded in the frontend component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Safari Route Explorer redesign is complete and fully functional. All interactive features (route switching, journey simulation, wildlife toggle) work correctly. The component uses hardcoded safari routes and wildlife zones (MOCKED - no backend API). Dark theme matches the rest of the site. Leaflet map with OpenStreetMap tiles loads correctly.
mocked_apis_note: MOCKED - Safari routes, waypoints, and wildlife zones are defined directly in the frontend component (hardcoded) for optimal user experience. No backend API integration for route data.
